parameters.query:
DECLARE @DELAI_MAX   INT = 15;
DECLARE @DELAI_RESP  INT = 4;
DECLARE @DELAI_CREAT INT = 5;
DECLARE @DELAI_JURID INT = @DELAI_MAX / 2;  -- 7j

SELECT
  XSAL.XSAL_0                                         AS code_x3_createur,
  XSAL.XNAMSAL_0                                      AS nom_createur,
  XSAL.XPRENOM_0                                      AS prenom_createur,
  LTRIM(RTRIM(XSAL.XNAMSAL_0)) + ' ' + LTRIM(RTRIM(XSAL.XPRENOM_0)) AS nom_complet_createur,
  XSAL.XEMAIL_0                                       AS email_createur,
  POSTE.YTIT_0                                        AS poste_createur,

  baallah.XSAL_0                                      AS code_x3_baallah,
  baallah.XNAMSAL_0                                   AS nom_baallah,
  baallah.XPRENOM_0                                   AS prenom_baallah,
  baallah.XEMAIL_0                                    AS email_baallah,
  baallah.YTELE_0                                     AS tele_baallah,

  resonsable_achats.XSAL_0                            AS code_x3_respo_achat,
  resonsable_achats.XNAMSAL_0                         AS nom_respo_achat,
  resonsable_achats.XPRENOM_0                         AS prenom_respo_achat,
  resonsable_achats.XEMAIL_0                          AS email_respo_achat,
  resonsable_achats.YTELE_0                           AS tele_respo_achat,

  resonsable_compta.XSAL_0                            AS code_x3_respo_compta,
  resonsable_compta.XNAMSAL_0                         AS nom_respo_compta,
  resonsable_compta.XPRENOM_0                         AS prenom_respo_compta,
  resonsable_compta.XEMAIL_0                          AS email_respo_compta,
  resonsable_compta.YTELE_0                           AS tele_respo_comptat,

  '{{ $json.XDATE_0 }}'                               AS date_creation,
  '{{ $json.NUM_0 }}'                                 AS numero_bc,
  '{{ $json.BPR_0 }}'                                 AS code_fournisseur,
  '{{ $json.XCODE_0 }}'                               AS code_fournisseur_sage100,
  '{{ $json.BPRNAM_0 }}'                              AS raison_fournisseur,
  '{{ $json.XCPT_0 }}'                                AS comptable,
  '{{ $json.XACH_0 }}'                                AS acheteur,
  '{{ $json.CREUSR_0 }}'                              AS cree_user,

  DATEDIFF(DAY,
    CONVERT(DATE, LEFT('{{ $json.XDATE_0 }}', 10), 120),
    GETDATE()
  )                                                   AS jours_ecoules,

  @DELAI_MAX - DATEDIFF(DAY,
    CONVERT(DATE, LEFT('{{ $json.XDATE_0 }}', 10), 120),
    GETDATE()
  )                                                   AS jours_restants_blocage,

  @DELAI_JURID - DATEDIFF(DAY,
    CONVERT(DATE, LEFT('{{ $json.XDATE_0 }}', 10), 120),
    GETDATE()
  )                                                   AS jours_restants_juridique,

  (@DELAI_MAX - @DELAI_CREAT) - DATEDIFF(DAY,
    CONVERT(DATE, LEFT('{{ $json.XDATE_0 }}', 10), 120),
    GETDATE()
  )                                                   AS jours_restants_createur,

  (@DELAI_MAX - @DELAI_RESP) - DATEDIFF(DAY,
    CONVERT(DATE, LEFT('{{ $json.XDATE_0 }}', 10), 120),
    GETDATE()
  )                                                   AS jours_restants_responsable,

  CASE
    WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, CONVERT(DATE, LEFT('{{ $json.XDATE_0 }}', 10), 120), GETDATE()) >= @DELAI_MAX
      THEN 'BLOQUE'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, CONVERT(DATE, LEFT('{{ $json.XDATE_0 }}', 10), 120), GETDATE()) >= (@DELAI_MAX - @DELAI_RESP)
      THEN 'ALERTE_RESPONSABLE'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, CONVERT(DATE, LEFT('{{ $json.XDATE_0 }}', 10), 120), GETDATE()) >= (@DELAI_MAX - @DELAI_CREAT)
      THEN 'ALERTE_CREATEUR'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, CONVERT(DATE, LEFT('{{ $json.XDATE_0 }}', 10), 120), GETDATE()) >= @DELAI_JURID
      THEN 'ALERTE_JURIDIQUE'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END                                                 AS niveau_alerte,

  @DELAI_MAX    AS param_delai_max,
  @DELAI_JURID  AS param_delai_juridique,
  @DELAI_CREAT  AS param_delai_createur,
  @DELAI_RESP   AS param_delai_responsable

FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL XSAL
  LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL         YSUP  ON XSAL.YSUP_0    = YSUP.XSAL_0
  LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.YFICHEPOSTE  YFICH ON YFICH.ZPOSTE_0 = XSAL.ZPOSTE_0
  LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE       POSTE ON POSTE.YNUM_0   = XSAL.ZPOSTE_0
  CROSS APPLY (
    SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL
    WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0179'
  ) baallah
  CROSS APPLY (
    SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL
    WHERE ZPOSTE_0 = 'PST00029' AND XFLG_0 = 2
  ) resonsable_achats
  CROSS APPLY (
    SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, 'chef.comptable@jbel-annour.ma' AS XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL
    WHERE ZPOSTE_0 = 'PST00160' AND XFLG_0 = 2
  ) resonsable_compta

WHERE
  DATEDIFF(DAY,
    CONVERT(DATE, LEFT('{{ $json.XDATE_0 }}', 10), 120),
    GETDATE()
  ) <= @DELAI_MAX
  AND REPLACE(UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(XSAL.XNAMSAL_0)) + ' ' + LTRIM(RTRIM(XSAL.XPRENOM_0))), '  ', ' ')
    = REPLACE(UPPER('{{ $json.XACH_0.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'), '  ', ' ')
  AND XSAL.XFLG_0 = 2

SELECT "XPAYCSSPJ"."XDATE_0", "XPAYCSSPJ"."NUM_0", "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0", "XPAYCSSPJ"."XCODE_0", "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPRNAM_0", "XPAYCSSPJ"."FCY_0", "BPARTNER"."XCPT_0", "XPAYCSSPJ"."XACH_0", "XPAYCSSPJ"."XDATEC_0", PO.CREUSR_0
 FROM   "x3"."BASE1"."XPOHCSSPJ" "XPAYCSSPJ" LEFT OUTER JOIN "x3"."BASE1"."BPARTNER" "BPARTNER" ON "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"="BPARTNER"."BPRNUM_0"
 left join BASE1.PORDER PO ON PO.POHNUM_0="XPAYCSSPJ".NUM_0
 WHERE   NOT ("XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T1821' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T1833' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T2406' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T2515' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T2517' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T2618' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T2694' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T2708' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3000' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3048' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3207' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3402' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3544' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3663' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3830' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T3851' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T4375' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T4388' OR "XPAYCSSPJ"."BPR_0"=N'T6448')
 AND XDATE_0 > DATEADD(DAY, -15, GETDATE())
 ORDER BY "XPAYCSSPJ"."XDATE_0", "XPAYCSSPJ"."XCODE_0"

select XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,'{{ $json.Email }}' as email_x3, POSTE.YTIT_0 from jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL XSAL
  left join jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE POSTE 
  ON POSTE.YNUM_0= XSAL.ZPOSTE_0
where (REPLACE(UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(XSAL.XNAMSAL_0)) + ' ' + LTRIM(RTRIM(XSAL.XPRENOM_0))), '  ', ' ')
    = REPLACE(UPPER('{{ $json["Nom d'utilisateur"].replace(/'/g, "''") }}'), '  ', ' ') OR REPLACE(UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(XSAL.XPRENOM_0)) + ' ' + LTRIM(RTRIM(XSAL.XNAMSAL_0))), '  ', ' ')
    = REPLACE(UPPER('{{ $json["Nom d'utilisateur"].replace(/'/g, "''") }}'), '  ', ' ')) AND XFLG_0=2 AND (POSTE.YTIT_0='ACHETEUSE' or POSTE.YTIT_0='ACHETEUR' or POSTE.YTIT_0='COMPTABLE')
